heading: Prohibition on use of foreign assistance for reimbursements for drug crop eradications
label: 2291b Prohibition on use of foreign assistance for reimbursements for drug crop eradications
text: Funds made available to carry out this chapter may not be used to reimburse persons whose illicit drug crops are eradicated.
notes: References in TextThis chapter, referred to in text, was in the original “this Act”, meaning , , , known as the Foreign Assistance Act of 1961.
